input.question: We are a student engineering team designing a vehicle for the FSAE competition. Attached is the FSAE rules document. What does rule VE.3.3.3 state exactly? Answer with only the text of the rule and no other words.

retrieved_context:
RULE: ve.3.3.3
            TITLE: balaclava

            rule VE.3.3.3: Balaclava
VE.3.3.3 Balaclava 
A Balaclava (head sock) which covers the driver’s head, hair and neck, made from Flame 
Resistant Material

final_answer: rule VE.3.3.3: Balaclava VE.3.3.3 Balaclava A Balaclava (head sock) which covers the driver’s head, hair and neck, made from Flame Resistant Material
